title: Savory German Sausage and Potato Hash
description: A hearty German-inspired dish featuring crispy sausage and potato hash, perfect for a weekend breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the diced potatoes to the skillet and cook until they begin to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced peppers to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
Return the cooked sausage to the skillet and stir to combine with the potatoes and peppers.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the butter to the skillet, stirring until melted.
Stir in the shredded Parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Season with flaky salt to taste.
